classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon XXVII.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: None of those who are in the catalogue of the clergy shall wear clothes unsuited to them, either while still living in town or when on a journey: but they shall wear such clothes as are assigned to those who belong to the clergy.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: And if any one shall violate this canon, he shall be cut off for one week.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A clergyman must not wear an unsuitable dress either when travelling or when at home.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Should he do so, he shall be cut off for one week.
